Meet Toni Schafer

Real Estate & Construction,
Done Differently

I'm Toni Schafer a licensed Realtor and one of the few female General Contractors in Central Kentucky. That combination gives my clients something rare: a single trusted expert who understands both the market and the build.

Whether you're buying your first home, selling a property you've loved, or starting from a piece of raw land I bring honesty, hustle, and deep Kentucky roots to every transaction. This is more than real estate. This is your life, built right.

Dual Licensed Realtor + GC
100% Central Kentucky Focused
1 of Few Female GCs in KY
